examples.output: Fortnightly maintains momentum without becoming a burden. Monthly felt too infrequent for a new group still finding its rhythm; quarterly too sparse to build shared understanding.

aiGuidance.extraction: Look for statements about why the group chose what they chose: the reasoning given for the final decision, what made this option preferable to the others. Capture the outcome logic, not the deliberation process.
aiGuidance.negativeGuidance: Do not write a blow-by-blow account of the discussion. Do not include objections that were not ultimately deciding factors. The rationale is the deciding logic, not a summary of the meeting.
aiGuidance.purpose: Explains the deciding factor — why this option was chosen over the alternatives. One to three sentences capturing the core reasoning.

description: Why this option over the alternatives.
name: rationale
